titleStmt.title: SII 9.228: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 228. (A.R. No. 499 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COMPOUND OF A RUINED ISVARA TEMPLE AT PEDDA-TUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 58, Pramādīcha, Pushya, ba. 11, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta, Sū[rya-gra]haṇa-parva, corresponding to A.D. 1133 December 23 Sunday; Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa occurred on Monday 25th and the solar eclipse on A.D. 1134 January 27. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva whose feudatory Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Traiḷōkyamalla-Mallidēva-Mahārāja was ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand. The latter is said to have made a gift of some plots of land, 2 oil-mills and a money-grant from the mint-office to the temple of the god Pañchaliṅgadēva of Tumbaḷa-bīḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhu vē .
bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara pa
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēva
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkatāraṁ salutta su
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōvajīvi samastaprasastisa
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ trailōkyamallamallidēvamahārājaru sindavāḍi sā
sukhadināḷuttamire śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 58 neya pramādīcasaṁva
puṣya bahuḷa Ēkādasi Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpāta sū
haṇamahāparvvanimittaṁ tuṁbaḷabīḍina śrīpaṁcaliṁgadēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivē
dīvigegaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ taḷavṛtti dēguladiṁ paḍuva puradakēri
gāṇa 2 Accina ṭaṁkasāleyalu daḷakke vīsa 2 Eleya hēṟinalu Ele 50 pi
keḻeya keḷage nāgarabāviyiṁ baḍaga gaḻde kamma 500 mattaṁ tuṁbuḷu mūva
baḷiya bāḍaṁ navileṟa Ūriṁ paḍuvaṇa maṁcigegalliṁ paḍuva haḷḷadiṁ mūḍalirbba
vāḍavāgi yikkida keyi mattaru 50 mattavā baḷiya bāḍaṁ taleyūru yībaḍa
līśānya kogaḷeyahāḷa holavēreya haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalinnesaṟuvāḍavāgi bi
ṭṭa keyi mattaru 16 Ī dharmamanārōrvva pratipāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsiyalu sāyira kavi
leya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷiṁ kaṭṭisi sāsirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarige ko
ṭṭa phalamaneydugu kiḍisidavaru vāraṇāsiyalu sāyira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvva
brāhmaṇarumaṁ vadhayisida pātakamakku . svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti
vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
